info.title: file2utf8
info.description: A simple tool for convert non-utf8 file to utf8 file

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Convert a non-utf8 file to UTF-8 (default is without BOM)

options.name: --confidence
options.description: The confidence of the found encoding. Between 0 and 1. [default: 0.9]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Show unmatched files, does not convert.

options.name: --ignore-utf8-files
options.description: Ignore utf-8 files, even not match bom.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the file or directory to convert

arguments.name: searchPattern
arguments.description: If Path is directory, the search string to match against the names of files in path. This parameter can contain a combination of valid literal path and wildcard (* and ?) characters, but it doesn't support regular expressions. [default: *.cs]
